nasb.text: I am weary with my sighing; Every night I make my bed swim, I dissolve my couch with my tears.

esv.text: I am weary with my moaning; every night I flood my bed with tears; I drench my couch with my weeping.

cnv.text: 我因悲歎而疲憊， 我夜夜流淚，把床漂起， 把床榻浸透。

ccb.text: 我因哀叹心力交瘁， 夜夜哭泣，泪漂床榻， 湿透被褥。

csbs.text: 我因叹息而困乏； 每个夜晚，我的泪水使我的床榻漂浮， 使我的床铺浸透。
